new_value: Added battery voltage-divider support (GPIO1/ADC1 + GPIO37 control) to heltec_wifi_lora32_v3_procpu.dts + puck/gateway .conf files + yaml. Enables real hardware battery reading test as specified. Verified via DTS structure matching existing HAL and Meshtastic variant.h. Commit 5d4bc1fbb
